summary: Iteration 279 - AUD-01 (Acoustic Bloom) and MEM-01 (Registry Memory Cache) Testing for Tesseract Experience. ALL FEATURES WORKING: AUD-01 correctly gates audio playback until 200ms dwell stability is achieved ('Stillness-as-Input' mechanic). MEM-01 correctly persists depth, address, path, isVoidMode, and gravity to localStorage under 'tesseract_anchor' key and restores on page refresh. TesseractExperience page renders at /tesseract with 9x9 lattice grid (81 cells), cell selection, double-click dive, Surface button, VOID ESCAPE at L3+, and gravity slider.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error repeatedly - KNOWN PRE-EXISTING issue from iteration_278
integration_issues.details: This error indicates a useEffect dependency issue causing infinite re-renders. Does not break functionality but impacts performance. Likely in useTesseractCore.js or related hooks.

critical_code_review_comments: useTesseractCore.js: AUD-01 implementation correct - isDwellStable state set after 200ms timeout in selectCell function (lines 549-557)
useTesseractCore.js: MEM-01 implementation correct - localStorage persistence with debounced save (lines 203-228) and restore on mount (lines 154-196)
usePhoneticSynthesizer.js: dwellGate option correctly gates audio playback (lines 303-309)
TesseractExperience.js: Proper wiring of dwellGateFunction to phonetic synthesizer (lines 306-323)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All AUD-01 and MEM-01 features working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: AUD-01 (Acoustic Bloom) and MEM-01 (Registry Memory Cache) fully tested and working. The 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React error is a KNOWN PRE-EXISTING issue that does not break functionality. TesseractExperience at /tesseract is the main test page.

AUD-01_acoustic_bloom_dwell_gate.details: Audio ONLY plays after 200ms dwell stability. Console shows '[TesseractCore] Dwell threshold reached - audio bloom permitted' and '[AUD-01] Acoustic Bloom triggered - stillness achieved'

MEM-01_localStorage_persistence.details: tesseract_anchor saves to localStorage with depth, address, path, isVoidMode, gravity, dwellMap, savedAt

MEM-01_restore_on_refresh.details: State correctly restored after page refresh - depth and address persist

tesseract_page_renders.details: TesseractExperience page renders at /tesseract with data-testid='tesseract-experience'

cell_selection_dwell_timer.details: Click selects cell, 200ms dwell timer starts, console logs 'Dwell threshold reached'

double_click_dive.details: Double-click on cell dives to next depth level (L0→L1→L2→L3 tested)

surface_button.details: Surface button visible at depth > 0, returns to previous depth

void_escape_at_L3.details: VOID ESCAPE button appears at L3+ with data-testid='action-void-escape'

gravity_slider.details: Gravity slider found with data-testid='gravity-slider', initial value 0.5 (SOURCE)

console_errors.impact: Performance degradation but does not break functionality
console_errors.likely_cause: useEffect dependency issue - KNOWN PRE-EXISTING from iteration_278

data_testid_verified: action-void-escape - VOID ESCAPE button at L3+
